figures.title: Figure 1. Adjusted Odds Ratios for NIH Grant Termination, 2025
figures.caption: Figure 1. Adjusted Odds Ratios for NIH Grant Termination, 2025. Forest plot of odds ratios from multivariable logistic regression (N = 5,219). Reference categories: University-Medical institutions and Northeast region. Error bars indicate 95% confidence intervals.

figures.title: Figure 2. NIH Grant Termination Rates by Institutional Type, 2025
figures.caption: Figure 2. NIH Grant Termination Rates by Institutional Type, 2025. Bars show percentage of grants permanently terminated within each institutional category. Error bars indicate 95% confidence intervals using Wilson score method. Dashed line indicates overall mean termination rate.

Table 2. Multivariable Logistic Regression: Predictors of NIH Grant Termination
